frontmatter.description: 401s on /api/* after JWT refresh fails (clock-skew, signing-key rotation, refresh-flow failure)

signature.embedding_seed: jwt refresh expired clock-skew authentication token

body:
## When this fires
401 responses on protected endpoints typically mean expired JWT, signing-key rotation drift, or refresh-flow failure.

## Playbook
1. Check the recent-deploys-auth source — most common root cause is a recent change.
2. Read jwt-config-current — verify clock-skew tolerance and rotation schedule.
3. Search past-tickets-similar for the last 5 resolutions.

## Common confusion
This is *not* [[auth-403-rbac]]: that fires on missing claims, not on token validity.
